summary: OPTIONAL UX (not a bug): remote node-drift needs a manual Install click — no auto-heal on connect. Local drift auto-repairs via boot-repair modal; remote detects on connect edge (syncModelInstalled) but heals only on user Install press. Verify-before-carding done: MPI-219 reload-extra-paths (LOCAL YAML folder-registration) does NOT cover node-drift (git-commit re-clone, different layer) — confirmed distinct. Auto-heal deferred because a multi-GB re-fetch on every connect edge is risky; design = first-connect-only + debounce + confirm gate. Low priority; manual path live-proven safe (MPI-222).
